testcase.name: test_health_check_marks_offline_on_heartbeat_timeout
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- INFO src.data.distributed.distributed_data_loader:distributed_data_loader.py:134 DistributedDataLoader initialized INFO src.data.distributed.distributed_data_loader:distributed_data_loader.py:330 Registered node n1 WARNING src.data.distributed.distributed_data_loader:distributed_data_loader.py:415 Node n1 heartbeat timeout INFO src.data.distributed.distributed_data_loader:distributed_data_loader.py:447 DistributedDataLoader shutdown INFO src.data.distributed.distributed_data_loader:distributed_data_loader.py:447 DistributedDataLoader shutdown --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------
testcase.system-err: --------------------------------- Captured Err --------------------------------- INFO:src.data.distributed.distributed_data_loader:DistributedDataLoader initialized INFO:src.data.distributed.distributed_data_loader:Registered node n1 WARNING:src.data.distributed.distributed_data_loader:Node n1 heartbeat timeout INFO:src.data.distributed.distributed_data_loader:DistributedDataLoader shutdown INFO:src.data.distributed.distributed_data_loader:DistributedDataLoader shutdown
